title: Salju's Quill
description: A collection of small edits & new stuff.
body:
This mod is mainly focusing on smaller edits, changes, and additions that I have done and made for myself which cannot really fit into any of my other mods or simply too small to maintain as separate mods. These can be anything from edits to vanilla items, new enchantments, and new items/blocks that does very specific things.

## **<center>~Vanilla Tweaks~</center>**
1. Taking damage from another entity cancels item usage with most items.
2. Creepers are now Prideful & Disabled Mob Griefing for them.
3. All Potions are now Stackable up to 16.
4. Hoes can now harvest crops with full Fortune functionality.
5. Villagers can more easily ride boats & camels with the player by driving near them.
6. Sneak-Right Click to get living entities off of any entity that they are riding.
7. Campfires can be used to disable enemy spawning.
8. Hotbar & Equipment can be kept on death.
9. Adjustments to axes, maces, & tridents.
10. Invisibility Adjustments for all Entities.

## **<center>-Enchanting Changes-</center>**
1. Reworked Combining Enchanted Items on an Anvil & Maximum Cost is now 15.
2. The Grindstone can grind enchantments from the top slot onto an Enchanted Book in bottom slot.
3. Repairing Items on the Anvil will always cost 1 Level & Ingredient per 50% durability.
4. Infinity is applicable to Crossbows & Efficienty is applicable to Brushes.
5. Body Enchantments are applicable to Animal Armor.
6. Tagged Items can be Enchanted on the Enchanting Table.
7. Config Options to make Enchanted Equipment Unbreakable.
8. Renaming only costs 1 Level.

## **<center>-Modpack Options-</center>**
1. Option to tag mobs to disable their ability to grief.
2. Option to tag mobs to forcibly make them peaceful, unless provoked.

## **<center>-Enchantments-</center>**
1. Sharpshooter - Increases the arrow damage from Crossbows.
2. Auto-Smelt - Automatically smelts ore blocks.
3. Magnetic - Pulls items towards the player while crouching.
4. Spikes - Deals Damage to attackers while blocking. Additional damage to phantoms.
5. Blazing - Sets attackers while blocking on fire.
6. Deflecting - Deflects Arrows, their base damage is set based on Enchantment Level.
7. Torrent - Increases damage to fire based enemies & water sensitive mobs.
